content: Hi! I am adding an abstraction over v4l2. However, the function i need is behind a config VIDEO_DEV=m so its symbols are not part of vmlinux.o. When rust/kernel.o tries to link with vmlinux.o, it complains that the symbol is not found. The simple fix was to use a conditional compilation flag that checks #[cfg(CONFIG_VIDEO_DEV = "y")] so its excluded from the rust/kernel.o, but i need this to be included for use in my module. Can someone help me understand how this can be achieved?
